title: Vivi Faces the Warlord
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on vivi faces the warlord, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Vivi Faces the Warlord. The trapped crew survives Crocodile’s death trap and scrambles to continue the mission before the war reaches Alubarna. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: T-t-that's one of the Shienibukai you're talkin' to there, Luffy...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: If you're going to abandon your friends, you better do it now, Ms. Wednesday.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Don't you wish to stop the rebellion...?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Are you crazy!? That thing's HUUUGE!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Vivi, run! That thing's impossible for you!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: They're all lining up to get inside!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Looks like they all see us as their meal...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: So you intend on fighting to the very end... Do what you wish. I'm sure if you kill all of them, the key can be found inside one of their stomachs.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: It bit off a huge chunk of the staircase in one bite!

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: What the hell are its jaws and teeth made out of!?

summary: This part develops vivi faces the warlord and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
